generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance CurrentSensorIM : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input current sensor I_M measuring motor phase current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder providing motor shaft angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder located behind the gearbox giving gearbox shaft position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring the final output angle of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensorIM
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance OutputAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleSensor
]

// C10: Data
instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw current trace I_M streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor encoder angular position trace r_M"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder angular position trace r_G"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle trace r_out"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque derived from current and motor parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity derived from encoder positions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted, OutputAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

instance AngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular acceleration derived from velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttBroker
]

// C10: Models/Data (Engineering & Simulation models)
instance SysMLMotorGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams of the PMSM and gear‑wheel/cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SimulinkFrictionFreeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink friction‑free dynamic model of the axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Coulomb and viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink Stribeck friction model for low‑speed behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink Dahl friction model capturing micro‑stiction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink LuGre friction model for dynamic friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MqttBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for live streaming of sensor data to the digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MatlabSimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation environment executing friction models and calculations"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService,
                 SimulatedMeasuredComparisonService,
                 ParameterExtractionService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing model integration and metadata handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterExtractionService
]

instance CustomDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom web dashboard visualizing real‑time data and model comparison"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization dashboard displaying live sensor traces and derived quantities"
    DTDFVocab:provides LiveDataVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters from live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance SimulatedMeasuredComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated (model) data with measured sensor data to evaluate model fidelity"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulatedMeasuredComparisonInsight
]

instance ParameterExtractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Extraction of friction model parameters for use in model‑based motion‑control improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extracted friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) that can be fed back to the robot controller"
]

instance LiveDataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visual representation of current, encoder positions, torque and velocity traces"
]

instance SimulatedMeasuredComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight showing deviation between simulated friction model outputs and measured data"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None – the digital shadow does not push data back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time (data acquired and processed at the robot’s sampling rate, enabling online identification)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow constellation consisting of the asset (first axis), purpose (FrictionDerivation), sources (sensor channels), processing components (simulation models), and generated data traces, all instantiated according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operated stage – the shadow is created and used during runtime to analyse friction while the robot is in service."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each data point to its source and processing model; use of both white‑box analytical and black‑box data‑driven friction models; validation by comparing simulated friction‑free behavior with measured data to detect deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data transmitted to the digital shadow over MQTT; models accessed via the Asset Administration Shell; processing performed within the digital shadow environment."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML as standardized modeling and interfacing frameworks."
]
